sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61344" key="kwni=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κων-ῖτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<sense id="n61344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κῶνος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extracted from pine-cones</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πίσσα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0219.tlg001:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhian.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
